title: Unsupervised Learning with Self-Organizing Spiking Neural Networks
excerpt: Ideas from the self-organizing maps literature are combined with an unsupervised learning algorithm on spiking neural network parameters. We demonstrate a significant improvement over previous work on classification accuracy and convergence time using the MNIST handwritten digit dataset.
citation: Daniel J. Saunders, Hava T. Siegelmann, Robert Kozma, Miklos Ruszinko (2018b)

title: STDP Learning of Image Patches with Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks
excerpt: Spiking neural networks are trained with a spike-timing-dependent plasticity rule to learn convolutional image features. We argue this is a small step towards biologically-inspired, efficient deep learning.
citation: Daniel J. Saunders, Hava T. Siegelmann, Robert Kozma, Miklos Ruszinko (2018a)
